title: Improve Lead Conversion Rate
insight: Your lead conversion rate has dropped by 15% in the last 2 weeks.
recommendation:
**Actions to take:**
1. Follow up on pending inquiries within 24 hours
2. Review quotation pricing - may be too high
3. Assign top-performing salespeople to high-value leads
4. Reduce quotation turnaround time

title: Quotation Approval Time Optimization
insight: Average quotation approval time is 4.2 days vs industry standard of 2 days.
recommendation:
**Speed up approvals:**
1. Implement automated preliminary approvals for < ₹50k quotes
2. Add more sales managers with approval authority
3. Set up mobile approval notifications
4. Create approval deadline SLAs

title: Reduce Production Delays
insight: 30% of production orders are delayed by 3+ days.
recommendation:
**Prevent delays:**
1. Ensure materials are available before starting production
2. Add buffer time for custom orders
3. Schedule preventive machine maintenance
4. Cross-train team members for flexibility

title: Optimize Machine Utilization
insight: Machine M-04 is running at 90% capacity weekly.
recommendation:
**Consider:**
1. **Plan for expansion** - Add second similar machine
2. **Preventive maintenance** - Schedule before breakdown
3. **Shift optimization** - Add second shift if needed
4. **Cross-training** - Train operators on backup machines

title: Chronic Low Stock Items
insight: Plywood and Steel Legs are consistently below threshold.
recommendation:
**Inventory optimization:**
1. **Increase reorder quantity** for high-usage items
2. **Lower reorder threshold** to trigger earlier
3. **Negotiate bulk discounts** with suppliers
4. **Set up automatic reordering** for essentials

title: Reduce Raw Material Wastage
insight: Material wastage is at 12% vs industry standard of 8%.
recommendation:
**Reduce wastage:**
1. Train cutting team on optimization techniques
2. Use CAD software for cutting plans
3. Repurpose offcuts for smaller components
4. Track wastage per operator for accountability

title: Preventive Maintenance Schedule
insight: Machines running >200 hours without maintenance increase breakdown risk by 60%.
recommendation:
**Maintenance optimization:**
1. Schedule maintenance every 180 hours (not 200+)
2. Keep backup machines ready
3. Stock critical spare parts
4. Train team on basic troubleshooting

title: Improve Dispatch Efficiency
recommendation:
**Streamline dispatch:**
1. Create packing checklists for each product type
2. Pre-label shipping boxes
3. Schedule regular pickup times with couriers
4. Implement barcode scanning for tracking

title: Boost Repeat Orders
insight: Only 35% of customers place repeat orders vs target of 50%.
recommendation:
**Increase repeat business:**
1. Follow up 3 months after delivery
2. Offer loyalty discounts for repeat customers
3. Send product care tips and maintenance reminders
4. Create referral incentive program

title: Expand Custom Furniture Line
insight: Custom orders have 40% higher margins than standard items.
recommendation:
**Scale custom offerings:**
1. Hire specialized designers
2. Build portfolio of custom work for marketing
3. Create semi-custom templates to reduce lead time
4. Invest in advanced machinery for customization

title: Leverage AI Employee Recommendations
insight: Only 40% of assignments use AI recommendations, but AI-assigned tasks show 25% higher completion rates.
recommendation:
**Maximize AI benefits:**
1. Trust AI recommendations - they analyze workload & expertise
2. Review AI reasoning before overriding
3. Track performance of AI vs manual assignments
4. Provide feedback to improve AI accuracy over time

title: Utilize RAG AI Chat for Quick Insights
recommendation:
**Get instant answers:**
1. Use dashboard AI chat for data queries instead of manually searching
2. Ask: "Show pending inquiries", "Which machines need maintenance?"
3. Get real-time KPIs without running reports
4. Save time on routine status checks

title: Confirm Automation Suggestions Promptly
insight: Automation suggestions left unconfirmed for >2 days lose 60% of their value.
recommendation:
**Act on AI suggestions:**
1. Review automation dashboard daily
2. Confirm or dismiss suggestions within 24 hours
3. Low-stock PO suggestions are time-sensitive
4. Machine maintenance suggestions prevent costly breakdowns

title: Improve Order Status Updates
insight: 25% of orders lack real-time status updates, causing customer inquiries.
recommendation:
**Maintain data accuracy:**
1. Update order status immediately upon milestone completion
2. Add photos/notes to status updates for transparency
3. Enable auto-notifications to customers on status changes
4. Review and update stale orders weekly

title: Complete Vendor Information
insight: 30% of vendors missing critical contact or payment information.
recommendation:
**Clean vendor data:**
1. Audit vendor records monthly
2. Ensure all vendors have: contact person, phone, email, payment terms
3. Add vendor performance ratings
4. Remove duplicate vendor entries

title: Track Inquiry Sources Accurately
insight: 60% of inquiries have "Unknown" source, limiting marketing ROI analysis.
recommendation:
**Better source tracking:**
1. Always record inquiry source (Website, Referral, Walk-in, etc.)
2. Track which marketing campaigns generate leads
3. Analyze conversion rate by source
4. Allocate marketing budget to high-performing channels

title: Sales-Production Handoff Optimization
insight: Delays occur at sales → production handoff due to incomplete information.
recommendation:
**Smooth handoffs:**
1. Sales: Ensure all custom specs documented before approval
2. Production: Review specs within 24 hours, raise clarifications early
3. Use shared checklist for handoff completion
4. Schedule weekly sync meeting between teams

title: Inventory-Production Coordination
recommendation:
**Prevent material shortages:**
1. Production: Share upcoming week's material needs every Monday
2. Inventory: Flag potential shortages immediately
3. Use shared material forecast dashboard
4. Prioritize POs for confirmed production orders

title: Enable Cross-Functional Visibility
recommendation:
**Break information silos:**
1. Use shared dashboards for key metrics
2. Tag relevant roles in task comments
3. Hold weekly all-hands standup (15 min max)
4. Share wins and blockers across teams

title: Post-Delivery Follow-Up Strategy
insight: Customers contacted within 1 month of delivery are 3x more likely to reorder.
recommendation:
**Structured follow-up:**
1. Week 1: Delivery satisfaction check
2. Month 1: Product quality and experience survey
3. Month 3: Maintenance tips and new offerings
4. Month 6: Personalized upsell based on past orders

title: Create Customer Loyalty Program
recommendation:
**Reward repeat customers:**
1. 5% discount on 2nd order, 10% on 3rd+
2. Priority production scheduling for loyal customers
3. Free delivery for orders >₹1L from repeat customers
4. Birthday/anniversary special offers

title: Implement Customer Health Scoring
insight: Proactive outreach to at-risk customers can prevent 70% of churn.
recommendation:
**Monitor customer health:**
1. Track: order frequency, feedback scores, payment timeliness
2. Flag customers with declining engagement
3. Assign account manager for high-value customers
4. Run win-back campaigns for dormant customers

title: Negotiate Volume Discounts with Suppliers
insight: Bulk purchasing can reduce material costs by 10-15%.
recommendation:
**Strategic procurement:**
1. Analyze 6-month material consumption patterns
2. Negotiate quarterly bulk contracts for top 5 materials
3. Share forecast with vendors for better pricing
4. Consider just-in-time delivery to reduce storage costs

title: Reduce Energy Consumption
recommendation:
**Lower utility costs:**
1. Schedule high-energy machines during off-peak hours
2. Implement machine auto-shutdown when idle >30 min
3. Upgrade to energy-efficient lighting
4. Monitor energy usage per machine to identify inefficiencies

title: Optimize Labor Utilization
insight: 20% of labor hours are idle time during slow periods.
recommendation:
**Better workforce planning:**
1. Use AI workload forecasting for staffing
2. Cross-train workers for multiple roles
3. Implement flexible shifts during high-demand periods
4. Track labor efficiency metrics per team member

title: Reduce Quote-to-Order Time
insight: Customers who receive quotes within 4 hours convert 50% better.
recommendation:
**Speed wins deals:**
1. Use quotation templates for standard items
2. Pre-calculate pricing for common configurations
3. Enable mobile quote generation for field sales
4. Set 4-hour response time SLA for all inquiries

title: Implement Quality Checkpoints
insight: Early-stage quality checks reduce rework by 80%.
recommendation:
**Quality gates:**
1. Pre-production design review
2. Mid-production quality inspection
3. Pre-packing final quality check
4. Document quality issues for process improvement

title: ABC Analysis for Inventory Management
recommendation:
**Prioritize inventory control:**
1. **A-items** (20% of items, 80% of value): Daily monitoring, low buffer
2. **B-items** (30% of items, 15% of value): Weekly review, moderate buffer
3. **C-items** (50% of items, 5% of value): Monthly review, high buffer
4. Focus purchasing efforts on A-items
